serialPortHelp: Device path of the DuoFern USB stick, for example /dev/serial/by-id/... or COM5.
baudRateHelp: Serial baud rate for the DuoFern USB stick. Usually 115200.
dongleSerialHelp: Six-digit DuoFern radio code of the USB stick, for example 6F1A6F. This is not the USB serial number.
deviceCodesHelp: Comma-separated list of DuoFern device codes. The adapter can also learn devices automatically.
autoCreateHelp: Automatically create ioBroker objects when a known or new DuoFern device is detected.
initOnStartHelp: Send DuoFern initialization sequence when the adapter starts.
statusOnStartHelp: Query device status after the adapter starts.
statusAfterCommandHelp: Query device status after movement or control commands.
periodicStatusPollHelp: Regularly query all known DuoFern devices for current status values.
periodicStatusPollMsHelp: Interval for periodic status polling in milliseconds.
externalActivityPollAll: Query All Devices for External Activity
externalActivityPollAllHelp: Query known devices for telegrams from remote controls or sensors if the affected actuator is not clearly identified.
ackIncomingHelp: Send ACK telegrams to the DuoFern stick after receiving telegrams.
debugRawHelp: Output raw DuoFern RX/TX telegrams to the debug log.
flushPartialMsHelp: Time after which incomplete serial receive buffers are discarded.
readAnswerTimeoutMsHelp: Timeout for waiting for responses during initialization and commands.
commandTimeoutMsHelp: Maximum time for commands in the send queue before they are considered failed.
reconnectIntervalMsHelp: Wait time before reopening the serial port after a connection loss.
